description: Flagged 'Send fixed-bid proposal to Jerry Pender at Specialty Capital' as an overdue post-call item in the morning briefing. David had already told Jarvis this was handed off to Shalini Arora and is handled. This has been corrected multiple times.
correction: Specialty Capital / Jerry Pender is assigned to Shalini. Task is complete. Do not surface it again.
systemic_fix: Before surfacing any overdue Sales task in a briefing, check OmniFocus notes for handoff language and cross-reference against team assignments. If David has previously stated a task is handled, mark it done in OmniFocus and stop surfacing it.
